title: cleome angulata
intro: Cleome angulata, also known as Angle-pod Spider flower or Angle-pod Spider flower, is a plant species belonging to the Cleomaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleome angulata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Cleome angulata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
